package rulefixtures

import (
	"os"
)

// scenario for world_readable_file_permissions: `os.OpenFile(path, flag, 0666)` or `os.WriteFile(path, data, 0777)` with world-readable/writable permissions
// fixture polarity: negative; family: security; severity: warning.
func scenario748Negative(path string, data []byte) error {
	return os.WriteFile(path, data, 0600)
}
